title: Create MAXimum
description: A Modpack that adds the Best Create Mods for the maximum Expierience
body:
# Create MAXimum
Create Maximun is an Modpack that add a ton off Create and other Mods to get you the Best Create and Gameplay expirience with excellent performance.




![Main Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be178cfe9d6c6dfa5455b6aed8b5136466c3f53b.png)



<details>

- FerriteCore
- Create: Encased
- Create: Extra Gauges
- Create: Metalwork
- Yung's Better Witch Huts 
- Create: Alloyed
- Create: Synthetic Pressure
- Motschen's Better Leaves

- Yung's Better End Island

- Create: Stones

<details>
<summary>Versioning</summary>
The Versioning in this Modpack is defined like this:
  
x.y.z+mcversion

example:
1.0.3+mc1.21.1
</details>
